intro: 5 medium problems that drill the Floyd Warshall Algorithm pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice medium Floyd Warshall Algorithm problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.
